A Designer’s Faux Pas

Making stuff one mmistake at a time.

Made Mistakes is the personal website of Michael Rose. A boring, tattooed, time traveling designer from Buffalo, New York who enjoys eating chicken wings and sketching on an iPad — not necessarily at the same time.

Paper for iPad Tips & Tricks

Mastering Paper by 53: Drawing Water and Waves

September 29, 2013

Learn techniques for drawing water and waves using the iPad app Paper by 53.

Mastering Paper by 53: Drawing Skies and Clouds

September 05, 2013

Learn techniques to draw blue skies, clouds, and pretty sunsets using the iPad app Paper by 53.

How to Draw Realistic Hair with Paper by 53

May 10, 2013

I'm often asked what my technique for drawing hair is. What follows is my answer to that question.

Words I’ve Written

Skinny Bones, a Jekyll Starter

September 02, 2014

A responsive, fully realized, and lightweight website starter for Jekyll.

Minimal Mistakes, a Jekyll Theme

May 28, 2013

A responsive Jekyll theme with a minimal design for text heavy sites by designer Michael Rose.

Makings of a Mistake, Designing the Site

April 04, 2011

As a designer we've all been there. When was the last time you got bored with a design and decided to just burn it and start anew?

Impressions of iPhone 4 from a Long Time Palm User

June 25, 2010

The following are some of my experiences and observations transitioning from Palm to iOS after nearly 10 years of baggage.
